title: Inbound Undo Follow activity
description: Handle inbound Undo{Follow} when a remote actor unfollows a local persona. Remove the row from followers table. If there was a pending follow_request, remove that instead.
design: Match Undo.object against Follow activities. The object may be a full Follow activity or just the Follow activity URI. Remove from followers or follow_requests table. No outbound activity needed.
acceptance_criteria: Remote unfollow removes follower row; subsequent fetch of /api/v1/accounts/relationships shows not following; duplicate Undo is idempotent (no error if row doesn't exist)
